channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Experiences of Solo Travel in Tashkent and Rural Uzbekistan
item.description: In this travelogue excerpt from Shivya Nath's book 'Rootless and Restless', the author recounts her solo journey through Tashkent and other parts of Uzbekistan. Upon arriving in Tashkent, she stays at...

item.title: Grey Whale in Vancouver Assessed After Sea-Doo Collision, Shows No Injuries
item.description: A grey whale that had been feeding near English Bay in Vancouver was struck by a Sea-Doo on the evening of Monday, May 5, 2026, around 7:30 p.m. PT. Witnesses along the seawall near Siwash Rock in Sta...

item.title: Collision between passenger bus and fuel tanker in Sumatra kills at least 16
item.description: A tragic road accident occurred on Wednesday on Sumatra island, Indonesia, when a passenger bus collided head-on with a fuel tanker truck, resulting in at least 16 fatalities and four injuries. The in...

item.title: Experimental Confirmation of Universal Growth Law in Two-Dimensional Quantum Systems
item.description: Researchers at the University of Würzburg have achieved a major breakthrough by experimentally confirming the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) universal growth law in two-dimensional systems. Originally form...

item.title: Whirlpool cuts earnings forecast and suspends dividend as appliance prices rise
item.description: Whirlpool’s stock dropped nearly 17% in after‑hours trading after the Michigan‑based appliance maker sharply revised its full‑year earnings guidance and announced plans to raise list prices for its pr...

item.title: Sara Duterte Refutes Allegations About Laptop Incident
item.description: Sara Duterte, Vice President of the Philippines, has officially denied recent claims that she threw a laptop during an incident, calling the story 'basura na tsismis' or 'garbage gossip.' The report, ...

item.title: Canberra to Have Public Defibrillators in Every Suburb by 2026
item.description: Canberra is set to become the first city in the world with publicly accessible automated external defibrillators (AEDs) in every residential suburb. Thanks to private donations exceeding $500,000 from...

item.title: FIFA extends Prestianni ban, midfielder set to miss first two World Cup games
item.description: Benfica midfielder Gianluca Prestianni fit miss the first two matches of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after FIFA extend the six-match ban wey UEFA give am to cover international games. The issue start afte...

item.title: Decline of Regional Identity Politics May Strengthen Hindutva’s Ideological Dominance
item.description: The article examines how federalism and strong state-based identities, which once acted as a major ideological counter to Hindutva politics in India, may be weakening after recent electoral developmen...

item.title: Overview of Gachagua’s Impeachment and ODM Party Disputes Amid Heavy Rains
item.description: On Thursday, May 7, Kenyan newspapers focused on major political and socio-economic developments. A key highlight is the ongoing impeachment proceedings of former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua, wh...

item.title: Climate conference highlights regional cooperation and glacier risks for Pakistan and South Asia
item.description: The second day of the Breathe Pakistan International Climate Change Conference in Islamabad focused on the urgent climate challenges facing Pakistan and the wider South Asian region. Speakers repeated...

item.title: A100 Concept Yacht Redefines Spacious Sailing Superyachts
item.description: The A100 concept yacht, a collaboration between Van Geest Design and Rob Doyle Design, proposes a revolutionary approach to sailing superyachts by prioritizing interior space without compromising sail...

item.title: Breakdown of Kenya’s 2026/2027 Budget Allocations and Key Beneficiaries
item.description: Kenya’s National Treasury has tabled a KSh 4.78 trillion budget for the 2026/2027 financial year, outlining how the government plans to allocate funds ahead of the 2027 General Election. The budget sh...

item.title: Family and Community Mourn 12-Year-Old Boy Who Drowned in Calgary’s Mahogany Lake
item.description: A deeply emotional funeral was held at the Calgary Muslim Cemetery on Wednesday for 12-year-old Damilola Afolabi, who tragically drowned at Mahogany Lake. Dozens of mourners, friends, and members of t...

item.title: Alaska court allows bear culling from helicopters to support caribou herd recovery
item.description: A judge in Alaska has ruled that wildlife officials can resume culling black and brown bears, including from helicopters, as part of a plan to aid the recovery of the Mulchatna caribou herd. This herd...

item.title: Kia Carens Seven-Seater MPV Now Available in South Africa
item.description: Kia has officially launched the Carens in South Africa, a seven-seater MPV built in India that slots below the larger Carnival model. Based on the stretched Seltos platform, the Carens is designed to ...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari comments on premeditated murder of aide Chandranath Rath after Bengal election results
item.description: The news article reports that Suvendu Adhikari, a prominent political leader in West Bengal, has addressed the issue of the alleged pre-planned murder of his aide, Chandranath Rath. According to the r...

item.title: Semiconductor Stocks Surge Led by AMD's 19% Gain
item.description: Semiconductor stocks are driving a strong rally in the U.S. stock market, pushing major indices higher amid optimism in the technology sector. Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) led the charge with a remark...

item.title: Main News Highlights in Nigeria for Thursday, 7th May 2026
item.description: Good morning Naija! Today we dey bring you the main gist wey dey top newspaper headlines for Nigeria this Thursday, 7th May, 2026. For politics, APC don waive screening for President Bola Tinubu, wey ...

item.title: Report Highlights Increase in Misinformation About Alberta Separatism from Foreign Sources
item.description: A recent report has revealed that foreign actors are increasingly generating and spreading false information related to Alberta separatism. The report suggests that this misinformation is aimed at inf...
